---
name: tsh-task-formatting
description: This skill hellps you transform an extracted task list (epics and user stories) into a format supported by your task management system (e.g., Shortcut, Jira). It applies a consistent benchmark template to every task, validates completeness, and manages a two-gate review process before any stories are created.
---

# Supported Task Management Systems

Delegate to specific skill when formatting tasks for different task management systems:
- when formatting for Shortcut, delegate to [`./tsh-shortcut-task-formatting`](./tsh-shortcut-task-formatting/SKILL.md) skill
- when formatting for Jira, delegate to [`./tsh-jira-task-formatting`](./tsh-jira-task-formatting/SKILL.md) skill
